subject: persian readiness update for Wellington | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-7101
body: Following yesterday's call, the persian effort in Wellington needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein seems to disagree with Albert Einstein on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-7101. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: delivery, drop-bears.
